work-nabil.title: IT Support Specialist at Nabil Bank
work-nabil.content:
## Responsibilities

- Managed **Active Directory** and **M365** environments for **2,000+ users**
- Configured and maintained ***FortiGate firewalls*** for enterprise security
- Resolved ***25-30 support tickets*** daily with **95% first-contact resolution** rate
- Implemented network policies and user access controls
- Provided tier-1 and tier-2 technical support to end users

## Key Achievements

- 📊 Reduced ticket resolution time by **30%** through process optimization
- ⚡ Maintained **99.5% uptime** for critical infrastructure systems
- 🚀 Led migration of **500+ users** to Microsoft Teams

edu-gbc.title: George Brown College
edu-gbc.content:
## Courses Covered

- ***Machine Learning*** Fundamentals
- **Neural Networks** & Deep Learning
- **Python** for Data Science
- Cloud Computing & **Azure**
- Database Design & **SQL**

## Capstone Project

Developed an ***AI model*** to predict customer churn using `scikit-learn` and `pandas`. Achieved **87% accuracy** on test dataset.

## Key Skills Gained

- **Full-stack** web development with ***React & Node.js***
- **Cloud** infrastructure with Azure & AWS
- Data analysis and *visualization*
- Mobile app development with ***React Native***
